{# Branded top bar injected above the Material search/tab bar. This file overrides material/partials/header.html entirely. The oc-topbar nav mirrors the marketing site Nav.tsx so switching between opencomplai.com and docs.opencomplai.com feels seamless. #}
{# Logo — always links back to the marketing site #} {# Light-mode logo (hidden by [data-md-color-scheme="slate"] rule below) #} {# Dark-mode logo #} {# Nav links #}
Blog Docs GitHub
{# Return link (mobile) + CTA #}
opencomplai.com Get Started
{# Render the rest of the Material header (search bar, color-scheme toggle, etc.) by including the original partial via the parent theme lookup. MkDocs Material does NOT support super() in partials; we replicate only the thin topbar here and let Material render its own header beneath it via the main.html block system. #}
{% include "partials/logo.html" %}
{{ config.site_name }}
{% if page.meta and page.meta.title %} {{ page.meta.title }} {% else %} {{ page.title }} {% endif %}
{# Runtime plugin key is material/search (MkDocs PluginCollection), not the yaml alias "search" #} {% if "material/search" in config.plugins %} {% include "partials/search.html" %} {% endif %} {% if config.repo_url %}
{% include "partials/source.html" %}
{% endif %}
